title: RUNBOOK.md Workflow Entry
description: Logical schema (not a JSON file format) for each workflow row in RUNBOOK.md. Used by the Pester static-check test to parse and validate the table.

orchestrationScript.description: Repo-relative path to a tracked tools/automation/invoke-*.ps1 file that MUST exist.

fixture.description: Either a repo-relative path to a tracked fixture under tools/tests/fixtures/runbook/, OR the literal string 'no payload' for workflows that take no request body.

recipe.description: Repo-relative path to a tracked docs/runbook/<workflow>.md file that MUST exist.
